summary: Backend tests: 13/13 passed for auth, profile, upload, matches, achievements. Frontend E2E: register, onboarding, dashboard load, protected routes, logout, login, match details navigation, and back-button all work. CRITICAL bug: AI matchmaking returns empty matches because GPT-4o wraps JSON in markdown code fences (```json) and `json.loads(response)` throws 'Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)'. Backend silently returns empty fallback. UI shows 'No matches yet. Click refresh to generate!' even though API returned 200.

critical.issue: GPT-4o response is wrapped in markdown code fences (```json ... ```). `json.loads(response)` at server.py line 147 raises JSONDecodeError; the except clause returns empty matches with misleading fallback challenges ('Complete your profile', 'Add more skills'). Backend logs show repeated 'AI matchmaking error: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)'. App appears to work (200 OK) but core AI matchmaking feature is broken end-to-end.

minor.issue: Cookies set with `secure=False`. Since the preview URL is HTTPS, cookies should be `secure=True` with `samesite='none'` for production safety; currently works only because browser tolerates same-site lax.
Comment says 'Optional: Add auth check here if needed' but no auth check is enforced. Any user can fetch any file path if they know it.

integration_issues.issue: Because backend JSON parse fails, dashboard always shows 'No matches yet. Click refresh to generate!' and fallback mini-challenges. /match/:id is unreachable from real flow. User cannot test match details, conversation starters, copy, etc., until backend fix is applied.

action_items: FIX (CRITICAL): In server.py `generate_matches_with_ai`, strip markdown code fences before `json.loads`. Example: use a regex like `re.sub(r'^```(?:json)?\s*|\s*```$', '', response.strip())` or extract substring between first '{' and last '}'. Without this, the entire AI matchmaking feature is broken.
Improve cookie security: set `secure=True` and `samesite='none'` for production HTTPS environment (read from env var to differentiate dev/prod).
Add auth check to /api/files/{path} so users can only download their own files (verify file_doc.user_id == current_user.id).
Backend should NOT silently swallow AI errors and return empty matches with 200 OK; return 502/503 or include an error flag so frontend can show a 'Failed to generate matches, retry' state.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 147: `json.loads(response)` is brittle. LLMs frequently return markdown-wrapped JSON. Always sanitize.
server.py line 149-155: Silent fallback masks real errors and makes debugging hard. At minimum, include a flag in response indicating fallback was used.
server.py line 363: TODO comment 'Optional: Add auth check here if needed' on /api/files/{path} – this is an information disclosure risk.
server.py lines 206-207, 261-262, 303: Cookies set with `secure=False` everywhere. For production HTTPS this should be configurable via env var.
server.py is 516 lines and monolithic. Split into routers (auth.py, profile.py, matches.py) and services (ai_service.py, storage_service.py) for maintainability.

server.py line 384 `if match_doc and match_doc.get('matches'):` — empty list is falsy so will regenerate on every call when AI fails; could lead to repeated expensive LLM calls and OpenAI rate-limit. Add cooldown / TTL.

success_rate.backend: 100% (status-level, 13/13 pytest); BUT functional AI quality fails
success_rate.frontend: 85% (all flows work except match listing due to backend JSON parse)

test_credentials: admin@skillpartner.com / admin123 (in /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Additional E2E user created at runtime.
seed_data_creation: Admin user is auto-seeded by server on startup. Test users are created dynamically per test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After the JSON parsing fix is applied, retest: (1) GET /api/matches returns non-empty `matches` array with valid partner_name, conversation_starters, etc. (2) Dashboard renders >=1 match-card-N tile. (3) Clicking a match navigates to /match/:id and conversation-starter-N tiles render. (4) Copy button on conversation starter works. (5) Refresh button on dashboard regenerates matches. Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v` for regression. Add an assertion `assert len(data['matches']) > 0` to test_matches_get to catch this bug.
rca of the issue: ROOT CAUSE: OpenAI GPT-4o (via emergentintegrations) typically returns code in markdown fences like ```json\n{...}\n```. server.py line 147 calls `json.loads(response)` directly with no sanitization. This raises JSONDecodeError 'Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)'. The broad `except Exception` at line 149 catches it and returns a fallback dict with empty matches and the misleading challenges 'Complete your profile' / 'Add more skills'. Endpoint returns HTTP 200, so tests pass status checks but the feature is non-functional. REPRODUCTION: Login as any user with skills, navigate to /dashboard; backend logs show 'AI matchmaking error: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)'. MITIGATION: 1) Add system prompt instruction 'Respond with raw JSON only, no markdown'. 2) Sanitize response: `cleaned = re.sub(r'^```(?:json)?|```$', '', response.strip(), flags=re.MULTILINE).strip()` before json.loads. 3) Fallback: extract substring from first '{' to last '}'. 4) Don't silently fallback to empty data — propagate error to frontend.
